name: LI-Outreach / 3 — Reply Handler (Webhook)
_comment: Receives webhooks from HeyReach or LinkedHelper when a reply/connection-accept/opt-out happens. Normalizes payload, classifies, logs to li_replies, and notifies Telegram/Slack for positive replies.

parameters.query: WITH lead AS (SELECT id FROM leads WHERE lower(linkedin_url) = lower($1) OR lower(linkedin_public_id) = lower($2) LIMIT 1), msg AS (SELECT id FROM campaign_messages WHERE engine_conversation_id = $3 OR engine_message_id = $4 LIMIT 1) INSERT INTO li_replies (message_id, lead_id, reply_content, reply_type, sentiment, raw_webhook_payload) SELECT msg.id, lead.id, $5, $6, $7, $8::jsonb FROM lead LEFT JOIN msg ON true RETURNING id, lead_id, reply_type;
INSERT INTO suppression_list (linkedin_url, linkedin_public_id, reason, source) VALUES ($1, $2, 'opt_out_reply', $3) ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING;

parameters.name: text
